Start Your Application Today!

Ready to take the next step in your education? Our admissions team is here to guide you through the application process and answer any questions.

Start Application

Complete Your Enrollment!

Congratulations on your acceptance! Complete your enrollment steps and register for classes before the deadline to secure your spot for the upcoming term.

Complete Enrollment

Registration is Open!

Spring 2025 registration is now open. Meet with your advisor and register for your courses early to get your preferred schedule.

Register Now

Welcome Back!

We're excited to have you return to APUS. Review your degree requirements and register for the upcoming term to continue your academic journey.

Register for Classes

Alumni Career Fair - February 15th

Join us for our annual alumni career fair featuring employers from across the country. Network with fellow alumni and explore new career opportunities.

Register for Event

Discover Your Future at APUS

Welcome! We're excited you're considering APUS for your educational journey. Explore our programs, learn about our flexible online learning format, and discover how we can help you achieve your academic goals.

Explore Our Programs

Browse our wide range of degree programs designed for working professionals and military members.

Congratulations Jorge! Your Application is Being Reviewed.

Thank you for starting your application to APUS! Complete the remaining steps below to finish your application and be eligable for enrollment in courses. Our admissions team is here to help if you have any questions. While you are awaiting a decision on your application, continue to gather items needed in order to enroll before the next start date.

ACTION REQUIRED BEFORE ENROLLMENT CAN BEGIN!

Request Official Transcripts

To complete your application, please submit official transcripts from all previously attended institutions. Transcripts can be sent electronically to transcripts@apus.edu or mailed to our admissions office.

Request Transcripts

Pre-Enrollment To Do List

Continue your enrollment process. While your application is being processed, finish your pre-enrollment action items below to begin your journey at APU. We're here to help every step of the way.

General Requirements

View My Documents

Completed:

To Do:

Upload ID
Begin Evaluation

* This item is appearing because you selected that you have credits that might be transferrable from another institution. If you would like to opt out or change this, click here.

Contact your dedicated enrollment advisor today, They are here to support you every step of the way.

Upload Photo ID

Please upload a clear, legible copy of a government-issued photo ID (driver's license, passport, or state ID).

Click to upload or drag and drop

PNG, JPG, or PDF (max 10MB)

Your ID will be securely stored and only used for verification purposes.

Opt Out of Transfer Credit Evaluation

You previously indicated that you have college credits from another institution that may be transferable to APUS.

Important: If you opt out of the transfer credit evaluation process, any previously earned college credits will not be evaluated or applied toward your degree requirements at APUS.

By opting out, you understand that:

  • You will not receive credit for courses completed at other institutions
  • You may need to retake courses you have already completed
  • Your time to degree completion may be longer
  • You can request a transfer credit evaluation later, but processing times may vary

Are you sure you want to opt out of the transfer credit evaluation?

Congratulations! You've Been Accepted

Welcome to the APUS family! We're thrilled to have you join us. Complete the steps below to secure your enrollment and prepare for your first term.
